title: unshare: make adjusting the OOM score optional
body:
The OOM score adjustment is an optional field in the runtime spec, so
only try to set it if it's set in the spec.

Signed-off-by: Nalin Dahyabhai <nalin@redhat.com>
Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @nalind Wanted to get this in today, so I rebased the PR.
Why'd this get moved to a new PR? It looks the same, but I'll have to test it again.
@vbatts vbats rebased and didn't want to wait for @nalind to get in.
@vbatts I screwed up the first version, please test this version.
